title: GMS Week 30 - GLIMMER OF LIFE?
summary:
Main
As we stand on the eve of Week 31 this 2025, global market turmoil continues unimpeded as wars rage, freight markets firm,economies flutter, and oil, currencies, and steel prices all fluctuate in a wavering tandem, delivering headaches along the way for all on this ride. While Trump announces further deals with Japan and the EU late on Sunday, his sketchy past is what keeps hammering this administration down, which itself is scrambling to do damage control vs. attempting to fix the state of the U.S.
